claim_text: Hook packages without apm.yml, SKILL.md, or plugin.json treat the directory as a hook bundle.

evidence.snippet: installation. Supports VSCode Copilot (.github/hooks/), Claude Code
Looks up ``apm.lock.yaml`` next to the manifest's ``apm.yml``,
"--frozen: apm.lock.yaml is out of sync with apm.yml.",
lines: list[str] = ["[i] Update plan for apm.yml", ""]
manifest_deps: Direct deps from the apm.yml manifest (regular +
reasons.append(f"  - {key} is declared in apm.yml but missing from apm.lock.yaml")
# and plugin.json.  Prevents zero-deploy when an older bundle
